title: Shopify CEO uses AI tool Claude to read his MRI scans
description: Tobi Lütke says he built a simple AI-powered viewer instead of installing the medical software usually required to open the files.

title: Check Point launches AI advisory service as adoption outpaces governance
description: The service will help businesses accelerate AI adoption with governance, risk management and regulatory compliance embedded from the start.

title: Netanyahu death rumours boosted by 2nd video: Even Elon Musk's Grok calls it ‘100% AI’
description: Benjamin Netanyahu’s second “I’m alive” coffee shop video reignited wild speculation online after Grok, Elon Musk’s X chatbot, labelled it “AI-generated” and “100% deepfake,” despite the clip being posted on the Israeli prime minister’s official account to debunk assassination rumours.

title: Omnix and Dataiku partner to accelerate AI adoption across enterprise and government in GCC
description: This partnership will help organizations adopt artificial intelligence at scale, with a strong focus on security, governance, and real-world business outcomes
